subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-13
subcodes.first_line: In the Shi'i tradition concerning this dispensation it is recorded that knowledge is composed of twenty-seven letters and that the divine messengers of the past from first to last have revealed but two letters
subcodes.first_line_orig: در حدیث شیعیان در خصوص ظهور موعود مذکور که علم بیست و هفت حرفست
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prophecy and fulfillment, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
